name: react-dataflow-animator-monorepo
description: Monorepo du package react-dataflow-animator et de son site Docusaurus.

scripts.build: npm run build -w react-dataflow-animator && npm run build -w @react-dataflow-animator/docs
scripts.dev: npm run build -w react-dataflow-animator && concurrently "npm run dev -w react-dataflow-animator" "npm run dev -w @react-dataflow-animator/docs"
